    "Splice made outside of an approved junction box or enclosure",
    "Exposure of insulated conductors to physical damage and environmental hazards",
    "Violation of NEC requirements for enclosing splices"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "De-energize the affected circuit immediately following site lockout/tagout procedures",
    "Install an approved junction box or enclosure at the splice location",
    "Re-make the splice inside the enclosure using approved connectors and secure the cover"
  ],
  "rationale": "A splice made outside of an approved enclosure or junction box violates fundamental electrical safety standards. It exposes the conductors to mechanical damage, environmental degradation, and presents a severe shock and fire hazard, especially in an active, in-service heavy-industrial environment.",

    "NEC 110.14",
    "NEC 300.15"
  ]
